intro.title: Factory Overview
intro.lead: Factory-direct manufacturing is only valuable if it delivers what overseas buyers actually need: consistent batches, stable lead times, and communication you can rely on.
intro.paragraph: Since 2010, COSUN has built our production flow around repeatability - from disciplined assembly standards to export-ready packing checks.
highlights: Faster launch cycles (prototype -> validation -> mass production)
Practical quality evidence (inspection checklists, test logic, photo confirmations)

left.title: SMT / PCBA Line
left.description: Controlled PCB assembly including placement + soldering profiles, with SPI/AOI.

left.title: THT / Hand-Solder & Rework Cell
left.description: Manual refinement and controlled rework to keep yield stable.

left.title: Cable & Harness Prep
left.description: Cutting, stripping, crimping, and continuity checks.

left.title: Plastic Parts Fit Control
left.description: Incoming checks + fit verification for housings and clips.

left.title: Metal Parts Processing / Hardware Prep
left.description: Metal part checks and assembly preparation for stable mechanical tolerances.

right.title: Car Charger Assembly Line
right.description: Process checkpoints aimed at reducing heat and connection complaints.

right.title: Cigarette Lighter Socket Assembly
right.description: Contact stability, assembly consistency, and packaging protection.

right.title: Phone Holder Assembly
right.description: Clamp stability, surface protection, and holding performance.

right.title: 100% Functional Test Line
right.description: Functional checks plus visual inspection before outgoing shipment.

right.title: Aging / Burn-In Line
right.description: Detect early failures before products ship.

qualityDiscipline.title: Quality Discipline That Protects Your Brand
items: ESD control where it matters to protect sensitive electronics.
Inspection logic aligned to buyer expectations (AQL-aligned sampling where applicable).
Documented checkpoints and photo confirmations when needed.

expectations.title: What You Can Expect
items: Clear checkpoints, clear revision control, clear next steps.
Production photos or videos when needed for alignment.
Stable execution designed for repeat orders, not one-time wins.

packing.title: Export-Ready Packing & Shipping Support
packing.description: A good product can still fail if packing fails. We support channel-appropriate packaging (bulk vs retail), carton marking, and protection planning.

primary.title: Request Factory Photos & Videos
primary.description: We will send real production visuals and a capability overview relevant to your product category.

secondary.title: Request Samples
secondary.description: Stock samples or branded samples to verify fit, finish, and performance before you scale.
